heading: Every format, in and out
lead: Lolly reads 25 source formats and renders 27 - here's the full set, grouped by what each one is. Eleven {roundtrip}: read *and* written, so they appear in both columns.

ingests.list: Figma · Penpot · Illustrator · InDesign · PPTX · PDF · SVG · Lottie
MP3 · WAV · OGG · M4A · FLAC · MIDI · MOD

exports.list: SVG · PDF · CMYK PDF · EPS · EMF · DXF
PNG · JPG · WEBP · AVIF · TIFF · ICO
